\tzpentry{ID4194}{Field Strength Expansion}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4194 introduces Field Strength Expansion as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} g_{ij}^{\text{FQT}} = \sum_{k,l} g_{ij}^{\text{Fisher}} \otimes g_{kl}^{\text{Quantum}} \otimes g_{mn}^{\text{Topological}} \end{equation}
